title: Thol Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Thol with a Z-Score of +6.63. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Thol is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 22.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 20%, and the wind speed is approximately 10.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that no heating is required, highlighting the intense heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
